mapper.insert: INSERT INTO compensation_record (compensation_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, compensation_type, compensation_amount, compensation_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{compensationNo}, #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{compensationType}, #{compensationAmount}, #{compensationStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE compensation_record SET compensation_status = #{compensationStatus}, external_grant_no = #{externalGrantNo}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, granted_at = IF(#{compensationStatus} = 'SUCCESS', NOW(), granted_at), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
